summary: Rebuilt student dashboard page with all 7 design sections (a-g): greeting (hero), ranking card with leaderboard, pending banner, course gradient cards, study-summary donut/counters, exam-progress bars, and popular-lessons list. Added 6 section components under components/dashboard/ (RankingCard, StudySummaryCard, ExamProgressCard, PopularLessonsSection, Donut, Ring, GroupedBars), extended DashboardLeaderboardEntry/ExamProgressEntry/PopularLessonEntry types, added 16 new i18n keys per locale. All 10 dashboard render tests pass + tsc + build clean.
